THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAURY, LEO AKA LEO LAURY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 934 CONNECTICUT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $605.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-03-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL BE STAYED TO DECEMBER 3, 1993.
